title: Updating the "last\first donation date" column when new donation is made

posts.author: Myssana (Myssana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I have two connected boards: “Donors” and “Donations” mirroring the date of the last/first donation and the total amount are mirrored from Donations to Donors.
I want also to mirror the information about the amount of the first and the last donation (not only the date).

Any suggestions how I can do that?

Thanks!

posts.author: adriennemccue (Adrienne McCue)
posts.cookedHtml: Following this because, connecting full CRMs are important to get a fuller picture of what a donor has done in the past

posts.author: csorum (csorum@habitatmetrodenver.org)
posts.cookedHtml: Following this as I have a different use case but would like the same result (would like to see the last task completed on a lower level board).
